body: All 4 e2e scripts done — commit 244c7d8. (1) e2e-multi-tenant.sh UC-08: 7 steps, tenant A+B bootstrap via event append, session/run creation, cross-tenant isolation verification. (2) e2e-provider-routing.sh UC-10: 11 steps, 2 connections (openai_compat+ollama), pool, route policy, binding, health-check, health-schedule CRUD, cost-stats. (3) e2e-fleet-monitoring.sh UC-14: 10 steps, 3 runs in different states, /v1/fleet, /v1/runs/stalled, /v1/runs/escalated, /v1/status, /metrics (Prometheus), /v1/stats, diagnose, interventions. (4) e2e-checkpoint-recovery.sh UC-07: 10 steps, save 2 checkpoints, list, GET by ID, restore both, verify run accessible post-restore, event trail check. All scripts: bash -n clean, exit 0/1, PASS+FAIL+SKIP counters, same curl pattern as e2e-agent-workflow.sh. Mailbox reports in .coordination/mailbox/inbox/manager/
